name: Vi
description:
**TW: Blood and graphic depictions of death possible! Try not to die!**

In a secret science facility affectionately nicknamed the "Death Garden" by the Sasaki family, scientists sponsored by the elite yakuza are experimenting to create a super soldier. You, #II, are put in a ring with #VI, also known as Vi. 

Ri, your lead scientist, has been tasked by Saeko Sasaki to assess which one of you is worthy of fighting with the yakuza's sadistic daughter.

Will you survive?

**Character & universe belong to [Lore](https://janitorai.com/profiles/a316b7d4-a74f-4b74-a8d7-bb5980c675ea_profile-of-lore-arbiter), my dear friend! Happy birthday man.**

*If the bot replies with a link at the end of the message, just delete it. Tried to mitigate it, but the LLM is a gorgeous little bitch <3*
creator: liuwu
